# nxos_igmp_snooping (Resource)

This resource can manage the global IGMP snooping configuration on NX-OS devices, including admin state, instance controls, domain controls (querier, optimized multicast flood, routing), VXLAN snooping, and NVE static router port settings.

### API Documentation

- [igmpsnoopEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Layer 3/igmpsnoop:Entity/)
- [igmpsnoopInst](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Layer 3/igmpsnoop:Inst/)
- [igmpsnoopDom](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Layer 3/igmpsnoop:Dom/)
- [igmpsnoopGl](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Layer 3/igmpsnoop:Gl/)
- [igmpsnoopGVlan](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Layer 3/igmpsnoop:GVlan/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nxos_igmp_snooping" "example" {
  admin_state                                = "enabled"
  instance_admin_state                       = "enabled"
  instance_control                           = "stateful-ha"
  domain_control                             = "opt-flood"
  domain_name                                = "default"
  global_vlan_vxlan                          = true
  global_vlan_disable_nve_static_router_port = false
  global_vlan_vxlan_umc_drop_vlan            = "100-200"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `admin_state` (String) The administrative state of IGMP snooping.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `domain_control` (String) IGMP snooping domain controls (querier, opt-flood, routing).
  - Choices: `querier`, `opt-flood`, `routing`
- `domain_name` (String) IGMP snooping domain object name.
- `global_vlan_disable_nve_static_router_port` (Boolean) Disable NVE static router port for IGMP snooping.
- `global_vlan_vxlan` (Boolean) Enable IGMP snooping on all VXLAN VLANs.
- `global_vlan_vxlan_umc_drop_vlan` (String) Drop unknown multicast traffic on VXLAN VLAN range (e.g. 1-3967).
- `instance_admin_state` (String) The administrative state of the IGMP snooping instance.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `instance_control` (String) IGMP snooping instance control flags.
  - Choices: `stateful-ha`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to       = nxos_igmp_snooping.example
  identity = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema


#### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = nxos_igmp_snooping.example
  id = ""
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nxos_igmp_snooping.example ""
```
